# Propositions

This repository contains dissertation propositions. Under typical conditions, you would have found this repository included as a submodule or submodule when you obtained the source files for the main dissertation.

### Compiling

To compile the propositions, you will need:

* Typst

Please use the script in the [utils/](utils) directory to compile the document. Manual compilation is also possible.

### Styling

The styling is set in [style.typ](style.typ). There you can configure the fonts for your propositions.

> If you are including the propositions as a submodule or in another way where it is not directly included in the main dissertation repository, I recommend that you create a separate `fonts/` directory in this directory, as you want these propositions to be self-contained.
